summary: Verified Emergency Flow and Rainbow Bridge (Farewell) features. All 8 emergency types display correctly with Report Emergency modal working. Rainbow Bridge visual indicators (🌈 In Memory badge, purple halo effect, Forever Loved text) display properly for Mystique on My Pets page. Farewell page has Memorial Wall with souls remembered count. Backend APIs all pass (100%). Cron triggers correctly exclude rainbow_bridge pets from automated birthday notifications.

issues: Minor: Console warning about missing DialogContent description (aria-describedby={undefined})

emergency_page.report_emergency_button: PASS - Opens modal correctly with data-testid='report-emergency-btn'
emergency_page.modal_functionality: PASS - Type selector, severity selector, pet selection all working

my_pets_page.in_memory_badge: PASS - '🌈 In Memory' badge visible for Mystique
my_pets_page.rainbow_emoji: PASS - 🌈 emoji displayed next to pet name
my_pets_page.purple_halo_effect: PASS - Violet/purple gradient background visible on pet card

farewell_page.rainbow_bridge_memorial: PASS - Section visible with '1 beloved soul remembered here'
farewell_page.mystique_memorial: PASS - Mystique's memorial is active in database

backend_apis.rainbow_bridge_wall: PASS - Returns memorials with Mystique included

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ EMERGENCY_TYPES correctly defined at lines 30-39 in EmergencyPage.jsx with all 8 types
✅ Rainbow Bridge halo effect implemented at lines 700-740 in MyPets.jsx with proper conditional styling
✅ '🌈 In Memory' badge at line 740-745 in MyPets.jsx and line 365 in FamilyDashboard.jsx
✅ Cron triggers at lines 43-50 in cron_triggers.py properly exclude rainbow_bridge pets from birthday notifications
⚠️ Minor: DialogContent missing aria-describedby in EmergencyPage.jsx modal (accessibility warning)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data (Mystique already marked as rainbow_bridge in database)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Emergency Flow and Rainbow Bridge features fully verified. Mystique (Shih Tzu) is the test pet marked as rainbow_bridge with crossing_date 2026-03-07. All visual indicators (halo effect, In Memory badge, Forever Loved text) working correctly. Memorial Wall on Farewell page shows 1 soul remembered. Cron triggers properly exclude rainbow_bridge pets from birthday notifications.
